authorship: All cases and tests were authored from scratch for this isolated bundle; rejected triples were fully replaced with unrelated mechanisms.

validation_results.baseline: For all three current cases, public tests passed while feedback and final tests each failed when run separately.
validation_results.intended_repairs: Disposable repaired copies passed public, feedback, and final tests for all three current cases without test changes.
validation_results.v2_replacement: node_manifest_mass_precision was removed as a complete triple and replaced by node_base64url_blob_ids.
